mapper.sql: id, employee_id, school_name, degree, major, start_date, end_date, is_graduated, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM educations WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY end_date DESC NULLS LAST, start_date DESC
SELECT FROM educations WHERE degree = #{degree} ORDER BY end_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE educations SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, school_name = #{schoolName}, degree = #{degree}, major = #{major}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, is_graduated = #{isGraduated}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM educations WHERE id = #{id})
